news.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
news.summary: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday. President Trump spoke about the U.S. response to Iran's nuclear program in the interview.

news.title: Anthropic confidentially files IPO prospectus with SEC, prepping Wall Street for landmark AI deal
news.summary: Anthropic said it confidentially filed its IPO prospectus with the SEC. The move sets up a potentially historic share sale for investors ready to jump into AI.

news.title: McDonald's unveils new global growth strategy to win over diners as competition rises
news.summary: High gas prices mean restaurants are competing for a smaller pool of customers. McDonald's new growth plan comes as inflation and high gas prices hit the U.S.

news.title: SpaceX sets aside up to 5% of shares in IPO for certain employees and friends
news.summary: Up to 5% of stock being offered by the company in the offering will be available in a direct share program. In an updated IPO prospectus, SpaceX said that up to 5 per cent of stock would be available.

news.title: Florida AG sues OpenAI, seeks to hold CEO Altman personally liable for alleged harms
news.summary: The complaint says the harms are the result of OpenAI's "insatiable quest to win the AI arms race and amass large fortunes"

news.title: Global oil prices trim early gains but still top $95 a barrel after Trump says peace talks with Iran are back on following a pause
news.summary: Talks with Iran are “continuing, at a rapid pace,” President Trump says. Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to stop attacking each other in Lebanon, he says.

news.title: My golf buddy dropped me when I didn’t ask him to be my financial adviser. Was I naive?
news.summary: “Friendliness alone is not a sufficient reason to trust someone with your finances,” she says. “Friendly’s not the same as ‘trust me,’’ she adds.

news.title: ‘I have no preexisting conditions’: I’m 56, earn $198,000 and want to retire early. Can I afford private healthcare?
news.summary: “I’m trying to figure out whether it’s worth my while achieving FIRE,” he says. “I am trying to find a way to make a difference in the world.”

news.title: Did Trump spark an IBM stock rally? It’s complicated.
news.summary: IBM’s strong stock momentum Monday comes as the software sector continues its comeback. IBM is the world's largest software company. The company has a market value of more than $80 billion.

news.title: Anthropic just set the stage for a blockbuster IPO — beating OpenAI to the punch
news.summary: OpenAI is expected to soon file confidentially for its own IPO. SpaceX is gearing up for its listing, and OpenAI is set to go public.
